pkgmetadata.longdescription: .. --restructuredtext--.. image httpsgithub.comubernostrumdjango-registrationworkflowsCIbadge.svg alt CI status image target httpsgithub.comubernostrumdjango-registrationactionsqueryworkflow3ACIThis is a user-registration application for Djangohttpswww.djangoproject.com_. There are two registrationworkflows (one-step, and two-step with activation) built in, and itsdesigned to be extensible and support building additional workflows.To get started, check out the documentationhttpsdjango-registration.readthedocs.io_.
